apiKeysDialog.secretKeyMasked: Secret Key is masked for security
apiKeysDialog.regenerateWarning: Regenerating keys will invalidate current ones

merchantDialog.namePlaceholder: e.g: Main Website, Mobile App, Rappi

step1.title: How do you want to accept online payments?
step1.subtitle: Pick your payment processor
step1.providerEmpty: No providers available. Please contact support.

stripe.title: Stripe Connect
stripe.subtitle: Cards with 3D Secure
stripe.description: Best for web and apps. Stripe verifies identity and handles the entire payment flow.

step2.channelNameHelp: Internal identifier — your customers won't see this
step2.sandboxHelp: No real charges — ideal for integration

stripe.infoText: We'll take you to Stripe to verify your identity and connect your bank account. Takes 5-10 minutes. You'll return here automatically when done.
stripe.alreadyHaveStripeTitle: I already have a Stripe account?
stripe.alreadyHaveStripeBody: Stripe Connect creates a new linked account under Avoqado's platform. It's separate from your personal Stripe — that one stays untouched. If you use the same email/tax ID during onboarding, Stripe may prefill some info automatically.

credentials.title: Provider credentials
credentials.help: Get these from your payment provider

resume.inProgressDesc: Continue the onboarding flow on Stripe so your customers can pay. The previous link expired if more than 5 minutes have passed — we'll generate a fresh one.
resume.restrictedDesc: To activate payments, complete these requirements on Stripe:
resume.completedDesc: You can accept payments. Edit local info here, or go to Stripe for tax/bank changes.
resume.pendingVerificationDesc: You've submitted everything Stripe needs. Their team is reviewing your documents — this usually takes 1 to 5 business days. We'll let you know when your account is ready. No action needed from you right now.
resume.rejectedDesc: Stripe wasn't able to approve this account. This can happen due to prohibited business types, inconsistent data, or anti-fraud policies. Contact support and we'll help.
